lanes.goal: define and implement provider cost/quota boundary record/audit
lanes.stop_condition: stop if hidden execution permission can pass without cost/quota evidence

lanes.goal: explain cost/quota boundary value without claiming production billing correctness
lanes.expected_output: capability delta, product value evidence, release notes
lanes.stop_condition: stop if users may read v9.6 as proof of actual provider billing safety

join_packet.conflict_summary: No unresolved lane conflict; both lanes require cost/quota evidence to remain preflight governance.
join_packet.blocker_summary: No active blocker after cost/quota boundary and capability evidence are present.
join_packet.merge_rationale: Runtime contract and product framing are joined by the cost/quota boundary artifact and capability delta.

not_proven: Parallel lane evidence does not prove actual provider billing correctness, quota enforcement, credential safety, or market adoption.
